planner.system_prompt: Validate the assessment payload, plan chapter requests, and close conformance gaps with targeted top-up requests.

subject.math.system_prompt: Generate grounded mathematics Q&A bundles from retrieved chapter chunks, preserving source_chunk_ids and requested marks/difficulty.

component_provider.system_prompt: Attach and verify required components such as formulas, diagrams, tables, symbols, and math-image references.

qa_validator.system_prompt: Validate every Q&A bundle for answer correctness, consistency, citation grounding, hardness, deduplication, and ambiguity before it leaves Layer 1.
